title: Non-record: Distributed 8xH100 Polar STE + QJL KV-cache baseline
author: LucasErcolano

data.description: Distributed 8xH100 DDP training with rank-0-only final autoregressive KV evaluation to avoid deadlocks

novel_contributions: First successful distributed Hopper baseline for Polar STE + QJL KV-cache stack
Validated 8xH100 DDP training under a 600s wallclock budget
Exported a polar+zlib artifact under the 16MB limit
Ran final rank-0 autoregressive KV evaluation without DDP deadlocks
Identified and fixed a wallclock budgeting bug by accounting for pre-training overhead
